# PERF-199 negative: session lookup lives in a middleware
lang: go
file: PERF-199-safe.go
variant: framework
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func SessionMiddleware() gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		sess, _ := c.Cookie("session")
		c.Set("session", sess)
		c.Next()
	}
}

func Handle(c *gin.Context) {
	_ = c.Get("session")
	c.Status(200)
}
